scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.test:all: cd frontend && npm test && cd ../backend && npm test
scripts.deploy:backend: cd backend && gcloud builds submit --tag gcr.io/$GCP_PROJECT_ID/election-backend && gcloud run deploy election-backend --image gcr.io/$GCP_PROJECT_ID/election-backend --platform managed --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && gcloud builds submit --tag gcr.io/$GCP_PROJECT_ID/election-frontend && gcloud run deploy election-frontend --image gcr.io/$GCP_PROJECT_ID/election-frontend --platform managed --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated
